creator: dustin@arctichost.com
text:
I Installed the find_ddos port from ftp.freebsd.org - and after starting the program, it caused the operating system to halt.
Also! - It doesn't properly unmount the hard drive, so it isnt using the halt command.

Fix: 

Don't use find_ddos? ;)
How-To-Repeat: Install find_ddos from the ports collection and type /usr/local/sbin/find_ddos - then it halts :)
